...Colonel Banastre Tarleton. In 1783, Robinson miscarried <mark>Tarleton's</mark> child, and the subsequent complications left her legs...
...paralyzed. After a sojourn in France to escape <mark>Tarleton's</mark> creditors, the couple returned to London in 1788...
